references.key: extensions for latent confounders e g fci style rules remain future work
references.raw: Assumption Violations: Like most methods, OCMB assumes causal sufficiency and faithfulness. Extensions for latent confounders (e.g., FCI-style rules) remain future work.
references.title: Extensions for latent confounders (e.g., FCI-style rules) remain future work

references.key: applicable scenarios ocmb is recommended for scale free networks biolo
references.raw: Non-identifiability: Under non-additive noise or faithfulness violations, even perfect ordering and CI testing may not recover the true graph. G. Applicable Scenarios OCMB is recommended for: • Scale-free networks: Biolo
references.title: Applicable Scenarios OCMB is recommended for: • Scale-free networks: Biolo

references.key: the main cost of large k is computational more ci tests not accuracy degradation
references.raw: CI testing provides safety net: Regardless of K, the subsequent CI testing phase removes false candidates. The main cost of large K is computational (more CI tests), not accuracy degradation.
references.title: The main cost of large K is computational (more CI tests), not accuracy degradation

references.key: this confirms that accurate orderings enable aggressive candidate restriction
references.raw: Smaller K is dramatically better: With K=1, OCMB achieves F1=0.84 and SHD=27 at 0% error, compared to F1=0.19 and SHD=695 for K=10. This confirms that accurate orderings enable aggressive candidate restriction.
references.title: This confirms that accurate orderings enable aggressive candidate restriction
